text: I experience a disorienting contrast between the two spaces. In the first, I sense distance, boundaries imposed by glass and walls, and the quiet intensity of focused conversation. I feel somewhat isolated, an observer rather than a participant. In the second, I am surrounded by vibrant colors and bold lettering. The words on the screen echo my experience: my perception is blurred, my mind wandering. Here, confusion and curiosity mix, and I am reminded of how easily clarity can slip away, replaced by questions and half-understood impressions. I feel contemplative, caught between spaces of knowledge and uncertainty.
